---
title: "Teaching"
format: html
---

<div class="archive-divider"></div>

<style>
.jm-dot {
width: 7px;
height: 7px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: #16a34a;
animation: jm-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
flex-shrink: 0;
}
@keyframes jm-pulse {
0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
50% { opacity: 0.3; }
}
.jm-bar a {
color: #15803d;
font-weight: 500;
text-decoration: underline;
text-decoration-color: #86efac;
text-underline-offset: 2px;
}
.jm-bar a:hover { color: #166534; text-decoration-color: #16a34a; }
</style>

<div class="prompt-line">
  <i class="fas fa-hashtag"></i> Microeconomics
  &nbsp;·&nbsp; 
  <i class="fas fa-hashtag"></i> Econometrics
  &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  <i class="fas fa-hashtag"></i> Applications
  <span class="cursor"></span>
</div>

<div class="archive-divider"></div>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="/styles/teaching.css">

::: {.section .wg-experience}

::: {.experience-widget}

::: {.experience-item}
::: {.exp-header}
::: {.exp-logo}
🏛️
:::
::: {.exp-meta}
::: {.exp-org}
University of Edinburgh - School of Economics
:::
::: {.exp-date}
Sep 2023 – Present · Edinburgh
:::
:::
:::

::: {.exp-body}
::: {.exp-role}
*Private Tutor*
:::
::: {.exp-courses}
- [**Topics in Microeconomics (ECNM10070)**](http://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/23-24/dpt/cxecnm10070.htm)
- [**Topics in Macroeconomics (ECNM10069)**](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/26-27/dpt/cxecnm10069.htm)
- [**Essentials of Econometrics (ECNM10052)**](http://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/23-24/dpt/cxecnm10052.htm)
- [**Applications of Econometrics (ECNM10056)**](http://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/23-24/dpt/cxecnm10056.htm)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.experience-item}
::: {.exp-header}
::: {.exp-logo}
🏛️
:::
::: {.exp-meta}
::: {.exp-org}
University of Edinburgh - School of Economics
:::
::: {.exp-date}
Sep 2023 – Jul 2024
:::
:::
:::

::: {.exp-body}
::: {.exp-role}
*T.A. for [Dr. Sean Brocklebank](https://edwebprofiles.ed.ac.uk/profile/sean-brocklebank)*
:::
::: {.exp-courses}
- [**Economics I (ECNM08013)**](http://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/23-24/dpt/cxecnm08013.htm)
  - Average teaching evaluation of 4.5 on a 5 point scale
:::
:::
:::

:::
:::
